nodes.label: Shopping List Ambiguous Column Fix Rationale
nodes.norm_label: shopping list ambiguous column fix rationale

nodes.label: Tech Stack: ASP.NET Core 8 MVC + PostgreSQL + Dapper + Npgsql 10 + Bootstrap 5
nodes.norm_label: tech stack: asp.net core 8 mvc + postgresql + dapper + npgsql 10 + bootstrap 5

nodes.label: Architecture: Controllers -> Services -> Repositories -> Dapper -> SQL Server
nodes.rationale: No inline SQL in C# code; all DB operations through named stored procedures; every query scoped to @UserId for cross-user isolation; IDbConnectionFactory is singleton, repositories and services are scoped
nodes.norm_label: architecture: controllers -> services -> repositories -> dapper -> sql server

nodes.label: Deferred Items: Password reset email, Real Coto/Carrefour API, PDF export, Bimonthly service calculation
nodes.norm_label: deferred items: password reset email, real coto/carrefour api, pdf export, bimonthly service calculation

nodes.label: Database Access Rules via PostgreSQL Functions
nodes.rationale: CommandType.StoredProcedure is NOT used because it maps to CALL which only works for PostgreSQL procedures not functions; Boolean parameters need DynamicParameters with explicit DbType.Boolean because Npgsql 10.x cannot infer from C# bool; Domain models must use set not init because Dapper's IL-emitted setters cannot set init-only properties
nodes.norm_label: database access rules via postgresql functions
